parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'url_start', url: $json.startUrl, message: 'Starting spider for ' + $json.startUrl }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'log', level: $json.pageCount > 0 ? 'success' : 'warn', message: $json.pageCount > 0 ? 'Spidered ' + $json.pageCount + ' page(s) at ' + $json.startUrl : 'Skipped ' + $json.startUrl + ': no pages scraped' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.text, directions: $json.directions, summarizePrompt: $json.summarizePrompt || undefined, fieldPrompt: $json.fieldPrompt || undefined, localLlmModel: $json.localLlmModel }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'log', level: 'info', message: 'Checking field "' + $json.field + '" on page ' + $json.pageUrl }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ field: $('Split Fields').item.json.field, context: $('Split Fields').item.json.summary, directions: $('Split Fields').item.json.directions, fieldPrompt: $('Split Fields').item.json.fieldPrompt || undefined, localLlmModel: $('Split Fields').item.json.localLlmModel }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Split Fields').item.json;
const found = $json.value != null && String($json.value).trim() !== '';
return [{
  json: {
    jobId: ctx.jobId,
    startUrl: ctx.startUrl,
    pageUrl: ctx.pageUrl,
    summary: ctx.summary,
    directions: ctx.directions,
    summarizePrompt: ctx.summarizePrompt,
    fieldPrompt: ctx.fieldPrompt,
    localLlmModel: ctx.localLlmModel,
    scraperBaseUrl: ctx.scraperBaseUrl,
    field: $json.field,
    value: found ? $json.value : null,
    present: found,
    confidence: $json.confidence,
    fieldQuestion: $json.fieldQuestion,
    logLevel: found ? 'success' : 'info',
    logMessage: found
      ? 'Found "' + $json.field + '" on ' + ctx.pageUrl + ': ' + $json.value
      : 'Field "' + $json.field + '" not on ' + ctx.pageUrl,
  },
}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ startUrl: $json.startUrl, requestedFields: $json.requestedFields, findings: $json.findings, pageResults: $json.pageResults, directions: $json.directions, summarizePrompt: $json.summarizePrompt || undefined, fieldPrompt: $json.fieldPrompt || undefined, localLlmModel: $json.localLlmModel }) }}
